## Checklist

- [ ] I ran relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I included screenshots for UI changes.
- [ ] I did not commit API keys, secrets, or private trading data.
- [ ] This change does not add broker order execution.
- [ ] User-facing financial language remains analysis-only.

## Validation

npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run test
npm run build
npm run test:e2e
